title: Savory Tunisian Dough Flatbread
description: A yeasty and crispy Tunisian dish featuring egg wash and ferment, perfect for a lazy Sunday lunch, this recipe is onion and garlic free, making it suitable for those with dietary restrictions.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
Punch down the dough and divide it into 4 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Brush the dough with olive oil and egg wash.
Place the dough on a lazy Susan spinner or a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the flatbread for 15 minutes or until it is golden brown and crispy.
